function.name: get_available_metrics
function.description: Retrieves a list of all unique data keys available in the system, including virtual metrics. Recommended to run this initially to identify valid metrics for other queries.

function.name: get_latest_data
function.description: Returns the most recent aggregated data point, including timestamps and values for all metrics.

function.name: get_metric_last_value
function.description: Returns the most recent value and timestamp for a specific metric key.

metric_key.description: The unique key of the metric to retrieve (e.g., 'pv_power', 'battery_voltage').

function.name: get_metric_history
function.description: Returns historical values for a specific metric key in a compact [timestamp, value] format. 'start' and 'end' can be ISO timestamps or relative strings (e.g., 'today', '1h', '24h').

metric_key.description: The unique key of the metric to retrieve.

start.description: Optional start time. Can be an ISO timestamp or relative string like '1h', '24h', '7d', 'today'.

end.description: Optional end time. Can be an ISO timestamp or relative string.

limit.description: Max number of records to return (default 100).

function.name: get_metric_statistics
function.description: Returns aggregate statistics (avg, min, max, sum, count) for a metric key over a period.

metric_key.description: The unique key of the metric to analyze.

start.description: Optional start time for the analysis window.

end.description: Optional end time for the analysis window.

function.name: get_metric_specific_stat
function.description: Returns a single specific statistic (avg, min, max, sum, or count) for a metric key.

metric_key.description: The unique key of the metric to analyze.

start.description: Optional start time for the analysis window.

end.description: Optional end time for the analysis window.

function.name: list_virtual_metrics
function.description: Returns all defined virtual metrics and their arithmetic formulas.

function.name: get_system_history
function.description: Returns a list of recent aggregated data points for the entire system. Each point includes a timestamp and a data object with all available metrics.

limit.description: Max number of records to return (default 100).
